raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on top","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, James?","description":"Safe opener that lets him set context before anything sensitive is named.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals since then","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in a few team rituals since the promotion decision — what's changed there?","description":"Observation-first probe into the visible engagement shift without forcing a diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"What landed","name":"What part of the feedback from that decision actually landed with you?","description":"Surfaces what he absorbed versus what may have bounced off or been misunderstood.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unsaid reaction","name":"What did you choose not to say after that decision?","description":"Opens space for the unspoken reaction without naming the decision as a problem.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step picture","name":"What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?","description":"Gets at whether he sees a believable next move or only vague momentum.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What is the mentoring program taking space for in your week?","description":"Tests whether mentoring is healthy stretch or crowding out core product work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Core path tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing not to spend time on because of the mentoring program?","description":"Forces the trade-off between stretch work and the core path he needs to build.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?","description":"Ends by moving toward support and near-term stabilization without introducing a new thread.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
